summary.news_summary: 【テストモード】APIキーが設定されていないため、実際の要約は生成されていません。GEMINI_API_KEY環境変数を設定してください。収集された記事のタイトルのみ表示しています。
summary.opinion_summary: 【テストモード】メディアの意見分析はAPIキーが必要です。実際の運用時はGemini APIキーを設定することで、ポジティブ・ネガティブ・中立の意見分析が自動生成されます。

sentiment.positive: APIキー設定後に自動生成されます

raw_articles.summary: Plus: The NSA tests Anthropic’s Mythos Preview to find vulnerabilities, a Finnish teen is charged over the Scattered Spider hacking spree, and more.

raw_articles.title: How to Buy a Bike That’s the Right Size for You
raw_articles.summary: Shopping for a bike that fits your body and suits your needs typically involves a lot of trial and error. Here’s our advice on how to make the process—and your ride—as painless as possible.

raw_articles.title: DuckLake 1.0: Data Lake Format with SQL Catalog Metadata
raw_articles.summary: DuckDB Labs recently released DuckLake 1.0, a data lake format that stores table metadata in a SQL database rather than across many files in object storage. The first implementation is available as a DuckDB extension and includes catalog-stored small updates, improved sorting and partitioning options, and compatibility with Iceberg-style data features. By Renato Losio

raw_articles.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer looks to the jam-packed earnings week ahead and explains what he's looking for.

raw_articles.title: Meta buys robotics startup to bolster its humanoid AI ambitions
raw_articles.summary: Meta bought humanoid startup Assured Robot Intelligence to beef up its AI models for robots, the company said.

raw_articles.title: Musk v. Altman week 1: Elon Musk says he was duped, warns AI could kill us all, and admits that xAI distills OpenAI’s models
raw_articles.summary: In the first week of the landmark trial between Elon Musk and OpenAI, Musk took the stand in a crisp black suit and tie and argued that OpenAI CEO Sam Altman and president Greg Brockman had deceived him into bankrolling the company. Along the way, he warned that AI could destroy us all and sat through…

raw_articles.title: OpenAI Enables Marketing Cookies by Default for Free ChatGPT Users
raw_articles.summary: ChatGPT’s new privacy policy states how the company uses cookies for tracking, to turn free users into paying subscribers.

raw_articles.title: Salesforce launches Agentforce Operations to fix the workflows breaking enterprise AI
raw_articles.summary: Enterprise AI teams are hitting a wall — not because their models can't reason, but because the workflows underneath them were never built for agents. Tasks fail, handoffs break, and the problem compounds as organizations push agents deeper into back-office systems. A new architectural layer is emerging to address it: workflow execution control planes that impose deterministic structure on processes agents are expected to run.One of the companies bringing this to the forefront is Salesforce

raw_articles.title: 200,000 MCP servers expose a command execution flaw that Anthropic calls a feature
raw_articles.summary: Anthropic created the Model Context Protocol as the open standard for AI agent-to-tool communication. OpenAI adopted it in March 2025. Google DeepMind followed. Anthropic donated MCP to the Linux Foundation in December 2025. Downloads crossed 150 million. Then four researchers at OX Security found an architectural problem that affects all of them.MCP's STDIO transport, the default for connecting an AI agent to a local tool, executes any operating system command it receives. No sanitization.

raw_articles.title: Dangerous New Linux Exploit Gives Attackers Root Access to Countless Computers
raw_articles.summary: The exploit, dubbed CopyFail and tracked as CVE-2026-31431, allows hackers to take over PCs and data center servers. The Linux vulnerabilities have been patched—but many machines remain at risk.

raw_articles.title: Apple's stock gains as company execs cite iPhone, Mac demand in boosting guidance
raw_articles.summary: On its quarterly earnings call, Apple said revenue growth in the current quarter would be between 14% and 17%, well above analysts' estimates.

raw_articles.title: Roblox shares plummet 18% as child safety measures weigh on bookings
raw_articles.summary: Roblox is facing over 140 federal lawsuits accusing it of failing to prevent child exploitation, and last month settled with Alabama and West Virginia.

raw_articles.title: Atlassian stock soars 29% after earnings show strong cloud, data center growth
raw_articles.summary: Atlassian's stock has been hit hard in the "SaaS-pocalypse" sweeping software names as AI threatens to disrupt their business models.

raw_articles.title: All the evidence revealed so far in Musk v. Altman
raw_articles.summary: The Musk v. Altman trial is underway, and that means exhibits, or the evidence to be presented in court, are being revealed piece by piece. So far, email exchanges, photos, and corporate documents are circulating from the earliest days of OpenAI - and from before the AI lab even had a name. Some high-level takeaways: […]
